query: SELECT id, fileName, fileType, analysisStatus, SUBSTRING(analysisResult, 1, 1000) as resultPreview FROM ad_report_files ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT id, fileName, fileType, analysisStatus, SUBSTRING(analysisResult, 1, 1000) as resultPreview FROM ad_report_files ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
